message:
feat(demo): add Panel and Tree showcase scenes with smoke test harness

Extends demo_showcase with two new interactive scenes demonstrating
rich_rust's Panel and Tree renderables, plus a comprehensive smoke
test suite for CI verification.

New scenes:
- panel_scene.rs: Panel showcase demonstrating box styles (rounded,
  square, heavy, double, ASCII), titles/subtitles, padding, and nesting
- tree_scene.rs: Tree showcase demonstrating guide styles (Unicode,
  Rounded, ASCII, Bold), node icons, collapsed nodes, and dependency graphs

Scene registry updates:
- Register PanelScene and TreeScene in build_registry()
- Add "panels" and "tree" to expected scenes list in tests
- Import new scene modules in demo_showcase.rs

Typography test improvements:
- Convert runtime assertions to const {} blocks for compile-time checking
- DASHBOARD_MIN_WIDTH_WIDE >= 60, DASHBOARD_LOG_HEIGHT >= 4, etc.
- Ensures invalid constants fail at compile time, not test time

Console API refinement:
- Remove unnecessary `mut` from Console variables in tests
- Console methods like begin_capture(), print() take &self not &mut self
- Fixes ~7 test functions with cleaner immutable bindings

E2E export example:
- Same mut removal for console builder patterns

Test infrastructure:
- New tests/demo_showcase_smoke.rs with per-scene smoke tests
- DemoRunner harness for consistent CI-safe execution
- 10-second timeout per scene, non-interactive mode, deterministic seed
- Verify each scene exits 0 and produces expected output markers

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
